'''Nushk''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]], located within the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was mostly covered with [[Methane/Legends|methane]] [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and had four [[Moon/Legends|moons]].
